title: Job Readiness Programme
content: Event Date and year: 20th March, 2025 Event brief description The Job Readiness Program, organized by the Department of Pharmacy in collaboration with the Career Planning and Development Division (CPDD) on March 20, 2025, aimed to prepare students for placements and career opportunities. The event featured expert speakers, including Ms. Manisha Chaudhary (Director, CPDD), Mr. Farhan Khan (Senior Manager, Placements), Ms. Prishali Chaudhary (Manager, Placements), and Dr. SK Abdul Rahaman (Dean, SMAS). They provided insights on resume building, interview techniques, industry expectations, and career growth. The session included interactive discussions, mock interviews, and Q&A, ensuring students gained practical knowledge and confidence for their professional journey. Event Detailed Description- The Department of Pharmacy, in collaboration with the Career Planning and Development Division (CPDD), successfully organized a Job Readiness Program on March 20, 2025. The event aimed to equip students with essential skills and knowledge to excel in placement interviews, professional communication, and career planning. The session commenced with a welcome address by Ms. Neha Sharma, the Organizing Secretary, who emphasized the significance of career preparedness in today’s competitive job market. Following this, Dr. SK Abdul Rahaman, Dean, SMAS, addressed the audience, highlighting the role of academic excellence and practical training in securing rewarding career opportunities. Mr. Farhan Khan (Senior Manager, Placements) delivered an engaging session on effective job search strategies, interview techniques, and employer expectations. His talk provided students with valuable tips on how to prepare for technical and HR interviews, ensuring confidence and clarity in professional interactions. Ms. Prishali Chaudhary (Manager, Placements) conducted an interactive workshop where students participated in mock interviews and resume reviews. She guided them on how to highlight their strengths and relevant experiences while applying for jobs in the pharmaceutical industry. The session also featured an insightful address by Dr. Shikha Yadav (Placement Coordinator, Department of Pharmacy), who discussed internship opportunities, research prospects, and career growth in the pharmaceutical domain. Throughout the event, students actively engaged in discussions, seeking guidance on career pathways, skill enhancement, and industry expectations. The Q&A session allowed participants to interact with the speakers, clarifying their doubts about job market trends and placement opportunities. The event concluded with a vote of thanks, acknowledging the Department of Pharmacy, CPDD team, speakers, faculty members, and student volunteers for their contributions to making the session successful. The Job Readiness Program proved to be a highly informative and impactful event, equipping students with essential career skills, confidence, and industry insights. It reinforced the commitment of the Department of Pharmacy and CPDD in fostering professional growth and employment opportunities for aspiring pharmacy graduates. Department Name – Pharmacy Event Outcome The Job Readiness Program enhanced students' interview skills, resume-building techniques, and career planning strategies, preparing them for the competitive job market. It provided valuable industry insights and practical guidance, boosting their confidence for future placements.
